title: gleicheniastrum circinnatum
intro: Gleicheniastrum circinnatum, also known as the Australian tree fern, is a species of fern native to Australia and New Zealand. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Gleicheniastrum circinnatum include the treatment of various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as an expectorant to relieve respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of the plant may include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
